Modules¶

simulator-pic¶

This code creates the stellar input catalogues for simulator-platonium.py and delivers all the necessary information in tabulated text files for the user to keep.

simulator-variable¶

This code generates noise-less light curves given a distribution of stellar and planetary parameters.

simulator-platonium¶

This is the main code that runs PlatoSim and generates imagettes and light curves
